Energy_saving outperformed in morning and evening hours when PV generation was low and cooling demand was minimal, whereas cooling dominated during peak temperatures in the afternoon. A key insight is to prioritize energy_saving mode during early and late hours when cooling demand is low and PV availability is limited, to reduce energy costs without compromising comfort.
